description: Unit: regex_match returns matched=false with stable null/empty fields for a no-match default case.
Unit: regex_match returns match text, index, numbered groups, and namedGroups for a representative pattern.
Unit: regex_extract returns first/count/matches for multiple matches and respects maxMatches.
Unit: regex_extract supports numbered and named captures across all returned matches.
Unit: regex_replace replaces first vs all occurrences according to replaceAll and returns replacementCount.
Unit: regex_replace handles documented JavaScript replacement tokens for numbered and named groups.
Unit: invalid regex patterns fail with actionable invalid-pattern errors.
Unit: unsupported or duplicate regex flags fail with actionable flag errors.
Unit: guardrails reject source text, pattern, and match count inputs that exceed configured limits.
Unit: zero-width global matches do not hang and still return bounded deterministic results.
Unit: requireMatch turns no-match regex_match and regex_extract runs into action failures with clear messages.
Catalog/runtime metadata: regex actions are sideEffectful false, engine-idempotent, grouped under Transform, and expose schemas.
Runtime integration: action.call can save regex_extract output with saveAs and a later step can reference the saved capture value.
Designer/component test: regex action inputs render with clear pattern/flags/replacement fields and output references show stable regex fields.
Designer/component test: named capture output inference appears when implemented, or generic namedGroups references remain available when deferred.
Run Studio/display test: invalid pattern and require-match failures surface the regex action-level message before generic wrapper text.

Chat guidance unit: Quick Ask regex guidance includes action names, JavaScript regex syntax, flags, capture examples, replacement examples, saveAs guidance, guardrails, and deterministic-runtime messaging.
Entitlement/security check: regex actions are available without AI entitlement, while AI guidance remains gated by existing Quick Ask access; guidance warns about persisting sensitive captures.
